adopted_roadmap.fase_ii_summary: 3 DGs shipped + 3 Baselines PASS validated: DG-127 A (signature attachment) H3-implicit-con-verdict-shift Baseline-11 INC→FP; DG-128 A (body scan taint propagation) H3-implicit-refinement Baseline-12 categorical FP; DG-129 A (module trust boundary tagging) H3-STRUCTURAL-SHIFT Baseline-13 FP→INC. Cumulative achievement: North Star principle empíricamente REALIZED — el LLM ahora razona sobre findings cross-module con contexto de signature + body content + attack surface. Duration real: 3 días vs estimate 3-4 semanas.
adopted_roadmap.current_phase_progress: 2/3 DGs shipped + validated PASS categorical (DG-130 A Sub-A2 Baseline-14 PASS + DG-131 A Sub-A2 Baseline-15 PASS post-hotfixes DG-131.0.1 placebo + DG-131.0.2 real). FASE III cubre: DG-130 A per-fingerprint verdict persistence + reproducibilidad cross-provider (backlog #4) COMPLETED_VALIDATED_PASS_CATEGORICAL, DG-131 A R20 cross-finding correlation (Stage 3 groups) COMPLETED_VALIDATED_PASS_CATEGORICAL, DG-132 A R22 diff-aware mode enhancement PENDING.

activeDG.deliverables_summary: Schema v7 aditivo backward-compat con group_id + is_group_representative columns en triage_verdicts + verdict_history + ALTER TABLE idempotente + triage-grouping.ts nuevo módulo con findingGroupKey (SCA:pkg@version:ruleId o category:ruleId) + groupPendingFindings + deriveDowngradedConfidence (factor 0.9) + formatMemberRationaleTag (member N of M) + constantes MIN_GROUP_SIZE=2 + triage.ts CLI wire con split groups + solitary + 1 LLM call per group representative + post-loop propagation N-1 members con downgraded confidence + rationale suffix + --no-group global CLI flag escape hatch + Tomo enrichment groupId + isGroupRepresentative + extension schema + webview badge GROUPED REP purple + GROUPED con tooltip explicativo + 18 tests DG-131 A (12 grouping + 3 colony-db + 2 tomo + 3 webview + 1 CLI integration test) + version bump 0.3.18 → 0.3.19. MVP scope trimmed: per-finding 'Re-triage individually' button deferred to Sub-A2 v2 (DG-131.0.1 reactive), --fingerprint CLI flag deferred (DG-131.0.3 reactive), prompt group-context engineering deferred (DG-131.0.2 reactive). Context+remediation solo para representative (members inherit verdict, no C+R records).

activeDG.baseline_15_pass_signals: (1) Migration hotfix DG-131.0.2 verified in production: schema v6→v7 exitosa sobre real SYNAPTIC_SAAS DB, cero 'no such column: group_id' error. (2) Terminal 'Grouping (DG-131 A R20): 12 group(s) covering 24 finding(s); 20 solitary. LLM calls saved by grouping: 12.' PASS. (3) Sidebar badges GROUPED REP (purple oscuro) + GROUPED (purple claro) render con tooltip functional en 12 reps + 12 members. (4) Rationale suffix `[group SCA:pkg@ver:CVE, member N of M]` visible en members. (5) Confidence downgrade matemático rep × 0.9 = member observable (75%→68%, 90%→81%, 60%→54%, 30%→27%). (6) LLM cost reduction 20% (8 calls vs 10) directamente atribuible a grouping. (7) BANNER path 'Confidence changed significantly (Δ X)' triggered empíricamente EN 5 FINDINGS DE UN SOLO SCAN — el signal que faltaba del banner heurístico DG-130 A: @grpc/grpc-js Δ 0.30, protobufjs DoS Δ 0.26, protobufjs-cli Δ 0.60, prismjs Δ 0.20, protobufjs-cli member Δ 0.68. (8) Previously (2 prior verdicts) preserved cross-3-scans (14a + 14b + 15) — DG-130 A regression PASS.
activeDG.banner_heuristico_3_paths_empirical_comp: Path 'Different provider' triggered Baseline-14b (agent.ts:62 deepseek → colony-memory). Path 'Confidence changed significantly' triggered Baseline-15 (5 findings con delta > 0.15). Path 'Verdict reclassified' (class change) unit-tested + NO empirically triggered en Baselines 14/15 (colony memory dominante). Coverage completa entre unit tests + empirical validation.
